Zhu Ao Á•ùÂ••
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Ao (Á•ùÂ••). Adviser to Guo Yuan, caused him to delay for a vital week which allowed Wei to prepare defences. Zhu Ao was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
